name_cn:
【Original Leather】🌈 Premium Exclusive 🔥 Black Plain/Gold
LE5A7 Large Smooth Leather Soft Handbag Large, Korean Celebrity Hobo!! The trendy shoulder bag Y finally has it!! The bag has a simple, structured silhouette, looking structured but not too sharp. Paired with the brand's signature insert buckle, it gives a unique vibe that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish.
Model: 753837【Original Leather】
Size: 30x31x13cm
